notes:
1) Fixed random crashes during/after matches
2) Hacks now work without needing to attack
3) Abilities stay active permanently (auto-refresh)
4) Settings autosave improved (abilities, radar, hotkeys)
5) Menu show/hide and unload hotkeys are now rebindable
6) Respawn toggles added (self / team / everyone, auto-capture at match start)
7) Stability and performance improvements
